title: dolichothele melaleuca
intro: Dolichothele melaleuca, commonly known as the 'Australian Green Bird's Nest', is a species of funnel-web mygalomorph spider that is native to Australia. side_effects: Dolichothele melaleuca can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea.
